why_selected: 判決書全文，可用於 RAG 語料庫

first_sample_preview.text: —Appeal by the defendant from a judgment of the Supreme Court, Queens County (Brennan, J.), rendered December 1, 1983, adjudicating him a youthful offender, upon his plea of guilty to robbery in the first degree (two counts), robbery in the second degree, and assault in the first degree (two counts)
